info.title: AML API V3

tags.name: Risk Rules
tags.description: Manage risk rules. Currently the same risk rules are used for Navigator and Lens

tags.name: Criteria
tags.description: Retrieve all criteria related to triggering risk rules

get.description: Get the risk rules for your team

parameters.name: include_id_map
parameters.description: Whether or not to include an id_map in response

message.example: You do not have enough privilege to access this path.

history_id.description: UUIDv4 identifier of the first version of the rule. If the rule has never been updated, will be equal to id

is_current.description: flag for whether the rule is in use or not

created_at.description: the date when the rule was created

application_criteria.description: object containing criteria for applying the given rule

trigger_criteria.description: object containing mongo-style statements determining how the risk rule is triggered

scoring.description: object containing the rule's scoring method and options (min_score, max_score, etc)

draft_rule_id.description: UUIDv4 identifier of the draft rule

history_id.description: UUIDv4 identifier of the first version of the category. If the category has never been updated, will be equal to id

signature.description: (Request Time, HTTP Method, Lowercase Path, Request Payload) signed with API Secret
signature.name: x-access-sign
